title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people visiting a farm. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A family is visiting a farm in the countryside. A little boy is feeding a goat while his parents are watching him. There is a wooden fence, grass and a red farm building behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing music. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Three teenagers are playing music together in a school music room. One is playing the guitar, one is playing a keyboard and one is singing. There are chairs and music stands around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
